meaning: Canadian Labour Congress加拿大劳工大会
examples: Create a workspace and copy the folder CLC from the Eucalyptus source.
CLC sends request to the user directory to verify user access to the file.
CLC checks it with the user database and creates a new session for valid user.
The community learning centre (CLC) manager is there if needed to support the learner.
The committee identifies a CLC facilitator, who is normally a skilled, well-educated and respected member of the community.
